profiles.fit_notes: Soft knit with natural ease. Choose your usual size for the intended fit, or size up for a looser drape.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Compare customer bust to CHEST × 2 using knit/top ease. Shoulder answer can nudge only if between sizes. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Soft knit with natural ease. Choose your usual size for the intended fit, or size up for a looser drape.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Compare customer bust to CHEST × 2. Do not use waist or hips. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Relaxed knit co-ord fit. If you are between sizes, choose the smaller combined size for a neater look or the larger for more drape.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Product uses combined UK sizes 8-10, 12-14, 16-18. Fit preference matters more than precise grading. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Adjustable neckline. Bust/chest is the key fit area; size up for more coverage or a softer drape.
profiles.algorithm_notes: No shoulder row. Compare bust to CHEST × 2. Use centre front length only as a height/coverage note. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Regular elevated T-shirt fit. Choose your usual size for a clean shape; size up for a more relaxed look.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Compare bust to CHEST × 2. Shoulder profile can nudge if between sizes. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Relaxed knit trouser. Waist and hip are the key measurements; choose the larger size if you want more ease through the hip.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Combined sizes. Compare waist and hip to WAIST/HIP × 2. Inseam can create a note or nudge only if between sizes. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Structured blazer with shoulder pads. If you have broad shoulders or prefer layering, consider the larger size.
profiles.algorithm_notes: No shoulder-to-shoulder row. Broad shoulders should nudge up and reduce confidence. Compare bust to CHEST × 2 with outerwear ease. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Designed to fit closer to the body. If your bust is usually hard to fit, consider the larger size.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Use lower bust ease than standard tops. Do not apply standard 8cm top ease or it may oversize the recommendation. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Relaxed cheesecloth shirt. Choose your usual size for the intended relaxed fit; size down if you prefer it neater.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Relaxed shirt: avoid double-sizing up for relaxed preference. Shoulder profile matters if between sizes. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Loose linen trouser. Waist and hip decide the size; length should be shown as a fit note rather than forcing a size change.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Inseam grades from 83cm to 88cm. Taller customers may prefer the larger size only if between sizes. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Jumpsuits need to work across bust, waist, hip and length. If you are between sizes, the larger size is usually safer.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Use the largest required size among bust/waist/hip as a strong signal. Length can warn or nudge only if between sizes. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Bias maxi skirt. Waist and hip decide the size; height affects where the hem sits.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Use waist and hip. Use length only for customer-facing hem-position warnings. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Soft knit polo. Choose your usual size for a regular fit, or size up for a looser shape.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Compare bust to CHEST × 2. Shoulder profile is secondary. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Relaxed long-sleeve knit. Choose your usual size for soft ease, or size down if you want a neater fit.
profiles.algorithm_notes: No shoulder row. Compare bust to CHEST × 2. Sleeve length can warn, not force. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Regular elevated V-neck T-shirt. Choose your usual size for a clean shape; size up for more ease.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Compare bust to CHEST × 2. Front neck drop is display-only, not recommendation logic. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Relaxed cheesecloth dress. Bust and waist are the main fit points; length affects where it falls.
profiles.algorithm_notes: No HIP row. Do not calculate hip fit. Explain lower confidence if customer says hips are hardest to fit. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Regular T-shirt fit. Choose your usual size for the intended shape; size up for a looser look.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Compare bust to CHEST × 2. Do not use waist or hips. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Waist is the key size point. This chart does not include hip, so hip fit should be treated as a note rather than a calculation.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Do not ask for hip measurement by default. If customer says hips are usually tight, lower confidence and suggest larger size if between sizes. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Regular crew neck T-shirt fit. Choose your usual size for the intended shape; size up for a looser look.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Compare bust to CHEST × 2. Do not use waist or hips. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Loose linen short. Waist and hip decide the size; choose larger if you want more room through the seat and thigh.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Use waist and hip. Inseam/length should not force a larger size. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

profiles.fit_notes: Oversized beach cover-up available in S/M and L/XL. Choose based on how much volume and length you want.
profiles.algorithm_notes: Two-size logic only. Do not try to map exactly to UK 8-18. Height creates length note. v3: usual size is weak anchor; category-critical measurements and bra-derived bust beat usual size. Shoulder profile applies chart check only where SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists; otherwise use shoulder_fit_rule as between-size soft nudge.

rules.if_bust_cm_and_bra_size: Use max(bustCm, estimated_bust_cm) as bust_source for CHEST; explain if bra_source is larger and drives size up.
rules.if_bra_only: Use estimated_bust_cm as bust_source. Confidence can still be high if it clearly maps to one size, medium if close to boundary.
rules.if_bust_only: Use bustCm. Do not infer cup volume. Confidence high only if chart pass is clear.
rules.if_neither: Fall back to usual size + fit preference. Confidence low for tops/dresses/outerwear.
rules.upper_chest_estimate: For products with UPPER CHEST, derive upper_chest_body_cm = min(bust_source_cm - 8, band_cm + 4). Use 0cm ease for this row. Use max(CHEST index, UPPER CHEST index).

maya_beach_dress_rules.rule: Compute bust_source=max(bustCm, braEstimatedBustCm). Use selected fit preference ease: close 6, regular 10, relaxed 14, oversized 14 because product is already a cover-up. If bust_source <= S/M threshold and usual size <= UK12, recommend S/M. If usual size >= UK14 or bust_source exceeds S/M threshold, recommend L/XL. If bust_source exceeds L/XL threshold, still recommend L/XL but confidence low with chest warning.

tag_glossary.between_sizes: Top two valid sizes are adjacent and score gap is below configured threshold; use preference/product rules to choose.
tag_glossary.larger_bust: Bra-derived or measured bust requires a larger CHEST size than usual-size anchor.
tag_glossary.broad_shoulders: Customer selected broad shoulders; chart row is used if available, otherwise shoulder_fit_rule applies as a soft nudge.
tag_glossary.narrow_shoulders: Customer selected narrow shoulders; chart row is used if available, otherwise shoulder_fit_rule applies as a soft nudge.
tag_glossary.prefers_relaxed_fit: Customer selected relaxed; choose larger adjacent option only when critical measurements do not fail smaller size.
tag_glossary.prefers_close_fit: Customer selected close; choose smaller adjacent option only when critical measurements still pass.
tag_glossary.prefers_oversized_fit: Customer selected oversized; size up unless product is already relaxed/oversized and measurements pass.
tag_glossary.larger_hips: Hip measurement or hip-fit question indicates larger hip need for bottoms/dresses.
tag_glossary.waist_tight: Customer says waistbands usually feel tight; nudge up on bottoms/skirts only.
tag_glossary.waist_loose: Customer says waistbands usually feel loose; nudge down only if hip still passes.
tag_glossary.tall_and_cropped: Customer is tall and product length_profile is cropped; warn or nudge up only if inseam/length grades meaningfully.
tag_glossary.short_length_if_tall: Warn taller customers that garment may sit shorter; do not size up unless length grades and they are between sizes.
tag_glossary.two_size_product: Product has only S/M and L/XL; use threshold and bucket logic, not UK 8-18 step logic.
tag_glossary.combined_sizes: Product uses combined UK buckets such as 8-10, 12-14, 16-18.
tag_glossary.no_hip_row: Product does not contain HIP row; do not score hip measurement, lower confidence if customer reports hip fit issues.
tag_glossary.upper_chest_check: Product has UPPER CHEST row; require both CHEST and derived UPPER CHEST checks to pass and use larger required index.

shared_required.question: Which sizing do you usually shop in?
What size do you usually wear?
How do you want this piece to fit?

top.question: What bra size do you usually wear?
top.logic: feeds estimated bust for CHEST row

top.question: Would you describe your shoulders as narrow, regular, or broad?
Do you know your bust measurement?

Do trousers usually feel tight around your hips?
Do you know your waist measurement?
Do you know your hip measurement?
Do trousers usually feel too short, too long, or about right?

Do skirts usually feel tight around your hips?
Do you know your waist measurement?
Do you know your hip measurement?

Which area is usually hardest to fit?
Would you describe your shoulders as narrow, regular, or broad?

Would you describe your shoulders as narrow, regular, or broad?
Do sleeves usually feel too short, too long, or about right?

chart_refs: SHORT SLEEVE V NECK JUMPER CHEST: 47.5/49.5/51.5/53.5/55.5/57.5 flat
unit_tests.why: 34D estimated bust 96.5cm; required chest 104.5cm with 8cm top ease; UK14 chest circumference 107cm is first pass. Upper-chest derived check also passes at UK14.

chart_refs: SHORT SLEEVE CREW NECK JUMPER CHEST UK18 flat 57.5 = 115cm circumference
unit_tests.why: 36DD estimated bust 104.1cm; +8cm ease requires 112.1cm chest, first pass UK18.

chart_refs: ELEVATED CREW T-SHIRT CHEST UK12 flat 53.5 = 107cm; UK14 flat 55.5 = 111cm
unit_tests.why: max(bustCm 100, bra estimate 91.4) = 100; +8cm ease requires 108cm; UK14 first pass.

chart_refs: BANDEAU TOP CHEST UK18 flat 45.5 = 91cm circumference
unit_tests.why: 32B estimated bust 86.4cm; bandeau ease 3cm requires 89.4cm; UK18 is first pass. Confidence medium because bandeau chest is fitted/low-ease and usual size conflicts.

chart_refs: CHEESE CLOTH SHIRT CHEST UK8 flat 54 = 108cm; UK12 flat 58 = 116cm; SHOULDER TO SHOULDER exists
unit_tests.why: Bust passes in UK8, but usual-size anchor and broad-shoulder soft rule keep UK12 as intended fit; UK14 is alternate for more shoulder room.

chart_refs: REGULAR V NECK T-SHIRT CHEST UK10 flat 51.5 = 103cm
unit_tests.why: Bra-derived bust 91.4cm plus close-fit ease 5cm requires 96.4cm, so UK8 technically passes; usual UK12, narrow shoulders and close preference produce UK10 as a conservative size-down, not UK8.

chart_refs: LINEN LOOSE TROUSER WAIST UK16 flat 37 = 74cm; HIP UK14 flat 57 = 114cm
unit_tests.why: Waist requirement 72cm with 2cm ease first passes at UK16; hip requirement 110cm with 6cm ease passes at UK14; max critical size is UK16.

chart_refs: LINEN LOOSE SHORT HIP UK18 flat 62 = 124cm
unit_tests.why: Hip requirement 117cm with 6cm ease first passes at UK18; hip beats usual size.

chart_refs: KNIT CO-ORD TROUSER LOUNGE SET bucket 12-14: WAIST flat 35 = 70cm, HIP flat 49 = 98cm, INSEAM 78cm
unit_tests.why: Usual UK14 maps to 12-14 bucket. Waist sits just above relaxed flat waist; length issue shows 16-18 as alternate because inseam grades to 80cm.

chart_refs: LINEN BIAS MAXI SKIRT WAIST UK14 flat 41 = 82cm; HIP UK12 flat 53 = 106cm
unit_tests.why: Waist requirement 77cm with 2cm ease first passes UK14; hip requirement 106cm passes UK12; max critical size UK14.

chart_refs: CHEESE CLOTH SKIRT WAIST UK16 flat 37 = 74cm; no HIP row
unit_tests.why: Waist requirement 72cm first passes UK16. Hip is ignored for scoring because no HIP row exists, lowering confidence and showing no-hip-row warning.

chart_refs: CHEESE CLOTH DRESS CHEST UK18 flat 50 = 100cm; WAIST UK16 flat 44 = 88cm
unit_tests.why: Dress bust is restrictive: bust requirement 106cm with 8cm ease exceeds max chest 100cm, so largest size UK18 is recommended with fit warning; waist would pass UK16.

chart_refs: JUMPSUIT HIP UK18 flat 57 = 114cm; CHEST UK14 flat 50 = 100cm
unit_tests.why: Hip requirement 112cm with 8cm dress/jumpsuit ease first passes UK18; hip beats usual size.

chart_refs: BLAZER CHEST UK18 flat 59 = 118cm; no SHOULDER TO SHOULDER row
unit_tests.why: 36C estimated bust 99.1cm plus 12cm outerwear ease requires 111.1cm, first pass UK16; broad-shoulder stylist rule nudges structured blazer to UK18 between sizes.

chart_refs: SWIMWEAR COVER UP CHEST S/M flat 56 = 112cm; L/XL flat 60 = 120cm
unit_tests.why: 36D estimated bust 101.6cm plus 10cm cover-up regular ease requires 111.6cm; S/M technically just passes, but usual UK14 maps to L/XL and two-size threshold puts UK14 into L/XL styling.

changelog: v3 adds bra_enabled and bra-derived bust logic for tops/dresses/outerwear.
v3 removes weight from required questions and scoring.
v3 adds shoulder_fit_rule per product as stylist-controlled soft nudge.
v3 adds upper_chest_check for Arla V-Neck and Arla Crew where UPPER CHEST row exists.
v3 defines exact UK combined-size mapping for Varo top/pant.
v3 defines Maya Beach Dress S/M vs L/XL rules.
v3 resolves Eden blazer fit_type by adding structured to enum.
